DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Dec-10-2002 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
*No appearances. The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT B.F. HERMAN's DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT -- Demurrer -- 1st c/a Breach of contract: SUSTAINED with leave to amend to plead terms of contract or to attach contract to complaint. 5th c/a Defamation: SUSTAINED with leave to plead more specifically the allegation applicable to each defendant. 6th c/a conversion: SUSTAINED with leave to amend to specifically plead what was conversed and by whom. 9th c/a Injuction: OVERRULED. Relief appropriate because of 8th c/a for unfair business practice. Motion to strike -- DENIED. Reporter: Eric Throne CSR # 7855, (JJM/301/md)
